# Apple — sources

- App Store Server API (what the adapter calls):
  https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appstoreserverapi
- Server Notifications v2:
  https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appstoreservernotifications
- App Store Connect API, used for reports (has an official OpenAPI spec):
  https://developer.apple.com/sample-code/app-store-connect/app-store-connect-openapi-specification.zip

There's no published OpenAPI for the Server API itself — the field shapes come from the
docs and Apple's official server libraries.
